changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.comment: Phase 7 of the canonical metric / on-demand LOD architecture. Adds a back-pointer from SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE point rows to the pointIndex of the RAW_OUTLIER_CLEANED canonical point they were projected from. The chart-series endpoint's bucket representativePointIndex addresses the canonical stream; the frontend resolves it to a physical lat/lng on the rendered SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE via this column.
